schemas.name: Virtual Auditor
schemas.description: AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm offering IBBI-compliant valuations (ESOP, FEMA, Income Tax, Companies Act, SEBI, IBC, 409A, complex instruments, AIF), FEMA compliance, GST and income tax appeals, forensic accounting, company registration, and secretarial services across India.

address.streetAddress: G-131, Ground Floor, Phase 3, Spencer Plaza Mall, Anna Salai
Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, off Veer Savarkar Flyover, Goregaon West

schemas.name: Our Team — CAs & CS Professionals | Virtual Auditor
schemas.description: Meet the Virtual Auditor team: Chartered Accountants, Company Secretaries, Registered Valuers, and support professionals across Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai.

alumniOf.name: The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI)
The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI)

mainEntity.name: Who leads the Virtual Auditor team?

acceptedAnswer.text: CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV) — founder and lead practitioner. 14+ years of experience. Personally handles valuations, complex appeals, and forensic engagements.

mainEntity.name: How many professionals does Virtual Auditor have?

acceptedAnswer.text: Team of CA, CS, and support professionals across three offices. Specialised teams for valuation, compliance, tax, and forensic work. Senior professionals assigned to every engagement.

mainEntity.name: Do you have specialists for each service?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Dedicated teams for: valuations (IBBI RV led), GST/IT appeals (CA led), FEMA compliance (CA + CS), company registration/compliance (CS led), forensic accounting (CFE led), and startup advisory.

mainEntity.name: Can I work with the founder directly?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. All valuation reports are signed by CA V. Viswanathan personally. Complex appeals and forensic engagements are founder-led. Registration and routine compliance handled by team under founder supervision.
No. All work done in-house by our team. No outsourcing to junior freelancers. This is a key differentiator from aggregator platforms like ClearTax and IndiaFilings that route work externally.
